description: Executes multi-task DAGs (parallel layers, data binding, failure policies). Merges the MK7 workflow-gateway (submit surface) and workflow-engine (DAG executor) into a single plugin.

capabilities.name: system.workflow.submit
capabilities.description: Submit a parallel DAG workflow for background execution. The DAG must contain a 'tasks' array; each task has id, capability, optional input (with {{taskId.output.field}} bindings), dependsOn, onFailure and onDependencyFailure. Returns confirmation with the workflowId; the final result is delivered to the chat when the DAG completes.

dag.description: DAG JSON object with a 'tasks' array defining parallel/sequential steps

capabilities.name: system.workflow.status
capabilities.description: Returns the status of a workflow by workflowId (RUNNING, DONE, ERROR, CANCELLED). Omit workflowId to get all tracked workflows.

workflowId.description: Workflow ID to query (omit for all)
